series_metadata.series_title: State Maximum Fee Schedule for Appointed
series_metadata.series_description: Formerly FIS-1 (019-0001). The State Maximum Fee Schedule is promulgated pursuant to Section 120.04 (B)(8-9) of the Ohio Revised Code. The schedule sets the hourly rates and maximum amounts which will be reimbursed to the counties by the Office of the O

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain one copy of the current version and all previously issued versions in the County Reimbursement operating area permanently., Paper: Shred
